import React from 'react' import {Container,Row,Col} from 'react-bootstrap' import { useSelector, useDispatch } from "react-redux"; const CartScreen = () => { const cartState = useSelector((state) => state.cartReducer); const cartItems = cartState.cartItems; return ( <>

My Cart

{ cartItems.map((item)=>( <>
{item.name} [{item.varient}]
{" "} Price:{item.quantity}*{item.prices[0][item.varient]}={" "} {item.price}
Quantity :{item.quantity}
)) }

Payment Info

 ) } export default CartScreen
